reason: Successfully tested GitHub username verification flow - agent used GitHub tool to retrieve authenticated username after granting access
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully showing Super Agent app with sidebar containing multiple agents
Found and clicked on "QA-20260423-035826-nnl9" agent in the sidebar - Agent detail view opened, showing agent in "idle" status
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" - Status indicator showed "idle", which satisfies the requirement
Sent message: "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - Message was sent successfully and session "GitHub Username Verification Check" was created
A GitHub account access request card appeared - Card displayed asking to allow access to GitHub with the account checkbox pre-selected
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant GitHub account access - Access was granted and agent resumed processing
An API Request Review card appeared asking to allow GitHub API request (GET /user) - Card showed the request details for fetching authenticated user
Clicked "Allow Once" on the permission dialog - Permission was granted and agent completed the GitHub lookup
Agent responded with GitHub username "yiw190" - Response clearly displayed: "Your GitHub username is yiw190." with tool call cards showing the completed actions
Took final screenshot showing the complete conversation - Screenshot captured the successful response with both tool actions marked as completed
